creator: jgrosch@MooseRiver.com
text:
The file, calendar.judaic, will be out of date as of 1 Jan. 02. This patch will fix the problem.

Fix: 

The patch to fix the problem can be found at  

ftp://mooseriver.com/pub/FreeBSD/Calendar/calendar.judaic.tgz

For more info on this patch go to the following page

http://mooseriver.com/~jgrosch/FreeBSD/Calendar/index.html
How-To-Repeat: Let your clock roll forward till 2 Jan. 02 00:01
